sessions.episode: Friends - S10E10  The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
dialogues: You know what? You are mean boys who are just being mean.
- Don't you love the huge yard? - The fireplace in the bedroom.
Or an Asian hooker sent right to your door?
I know, and with the baby coming?
I really, really think I can.
Okay, quick. We gotta find a cab and follow them.
Well, at least the perfume's not mine. Be thankful for that.
Okay. Well, talk to you later, okay? Bye.
This is bringing out a lovely color in you.
So... What did you think of the house?
koreanHints: 1. 그게 침실에 있는 벽난로를 정말 좋아했어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- The [명사] in the [장소] : 특정 장소에 있는 특정 물건을 강조할 때 쓰는 자연스러운 표현. 문맥상 동사 없이 명사구만으로도 "그게 좋았어"라는 의미 전달 가능
- talk to you later : 전화나 대화를 마무리할 때 쓰는 캐주얼한 작별 인사. "나중에 얘기하자"는 뉘앙스
- What did you think of ~ : 상대방의 의견이나 느낌을 물어볼 때 쓰는 정중하고 자연스러운 표현. How did you like보다 더 중립적
